subject: Cannot join assigned breakout room
description: Host opened breakouts; user sees prompt but join fails or loops back to main room.

ts_steps.title: Second monitor
ts_steps.action: Check hidden prompt on other display.

ts_steps.title: Alt+Tab
ts_steps.action: Find Zoom dialog behind fullscreen apps.

ts_steps.title: Host reassign
ts_steps.action: Host closes breakouts and reopens; reassign user.

ts_steps.title: Webinar vs Meeting
ts_steps.action: Confirm license allows breakout for role.

ts_steps.title: Firewall rare
ts_steps.action: If main room works always — usually version or UI miss.

internal_information: Missed prompt, version skew, host workflow, role limits.
